channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Sri Lanka to repatriate remains of 84 Iranian sailors killed in US attack
item.description: The 32 sailors who were rescued by Sri Lanka's navy will remain in the island nation, said the Foreign Ministry.

item.title: Explosions near Tehran al-Quds Day march in solidarity with Palestinians
item.description: State media outlet Press TV says one woman was killed from shrapnel as a result of a US-Israeli airstrike.

item.title: Two killed in Oman by drones, several also fired at Saudi Arabia
item.description: Two drones target Oman's Sohar province, killing two foreign nationals and injuring others, state news agency reports.

item.title: French soldier killed and others wounded in attack in Iraq
item.description: A drone attack on a joint French-Kurdish base in northern Iraq has killed one French soldier and wounded several others.

item.title: Force majeure: What is it and why have some Gulf countries invoked it?
item.description: Several Gulf nations have declared force majeure on oil and gas shipment since the US-Israel’s war on Iran was launched.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 14 of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: Israel strikes Tehran as Iran retaliates across the Gulf; Hormuz disruption pushes oil prices higher and tensions rise.

item.title: How Israel-US war on Iran puts $50bn in Indian remittances at risk
item.description: The US-Israel war on Iran has caused gas shortages, while nine million Indian expats in the Gulf face uncertainty.

item.title: Afghanistan accuses Pakistan of air attacks on homes in Kabul, Kandahar
item.description: Women and children were among those killed in the attacks, according to the Taliban.

item.title: French soldier killed, others wounded in attack in Iraq, Macron says
item.description: French president condemns 'unacceptable' attack in Kurdish region of northern Iraq.

item.title: Oil stays above $100 a barrel amid Iran’s stranglehold on Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Energy markets remain on tenterhooks as the prospect of prolonged war in the Middle East grows.
